name: leios_eb_invalid_vrf
description: The server offers an EB then delivers a body whose lottery proof does not verify. The VT-Role transition in Leios.Linear carries the premise isValid s (inj₁ (ebHeader eb)), which resolves via headerValid and ebValid to require lotteryPfValid: verify pk (slotNumber eb) st (lotteryPf eb) (Leios.Protocol). A body that fails this check is filtered out by L.filter (isValid? s) msgs in the Slot₁ transition and never enters EBs'. A conforming node must therefore not vote for an EB whose lottery proof cannot be verified against the announced producer's key and stake. NOTE: the block_bytes field below is a CBOR placeholder (0xa0 = empty map). For this scenario to isolate lotteryPfValid as the failing check rather than a parse error, block_bytes must be replaced with a correctly serialised EndorserBlock CBOR where all fields are valid except lotteryPf, which is set to an all-zero or otherwise invalid proof.
